_readme: Single source of truth for all editable business info. Edit via admin.html — or carefully by hand. The website reads this file; if it is missing or invalid, the site falls back to built-in defaults.

business.nameZh: 巧手堂盲人按摩推拿中心
business.addressEn: [Full street address here], Simpang Ampat, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia
business.addressZh: [完整街道地址]，Simpang Ampat, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

hours.zh: 每日 10:00 – 22:00（请以专页公布为准）

services.descEn: Deep, flowing traditional Chinese massage to release tension, improve circulation and restore balance.
services.descZh: 深层而流畅的传统推拿，疏通经络、促进血液循环、恢复身体平衡。

services.descEn: Precise pressure-point therapy on the feet — the classic art where blind therapists truly excel.
services.descZh: 精准的足部反射区按压疗法——视障按摩师最引以为傲的经典手艺。

services.descEn: Targeted relief for desk workers and drivers — melt away stiffness, headaches and knots.
services.descZh: 专为上班族与驾驶人士而设，化解僵硬、头痛与肌肉结节。

services.descEn: Time-honoured detox therapies to draw out heat, ease soreness and refresh the body.
services.descZh: 历史悠久的排毒疗法，祛湿散热、缓解酸痛、焕发活力。
